title: Invalid array format for HTTP query parameters
symptom: When attempting to send an HTTP request with query parameters, n8n throws an error indicating that the provided value is not supported.
applies_when: Passing query parameters as an array
not_this_if: Query parameters are passed as a simple JSON object
root_cause: The HTTP node in n8n expects query parameters to be formatted as a simple JSON object. If an array is provided instead, it results in an error because the node cannot process the array format correctly.
fix_steps: Use the JSON.stringify() method to convert the parameters to a JSON string.
Set the field type to JSON in the HTTP node settings.
agent_instruction: Ensure query parameters are formatted as a JSON string and set the field type to JSON.
